programme.title: Tango Charlie
programme.desc: Tarun, a BSF officer, along with his battalion gets deployed to Kargil when a war between India and Pakistan breaks out. This is where Tarun faces the life-threatening challenge.

programme.title: Dhol
programme.desc: Four young loafers wish to simplify their life by wooing a loaded heiress. Unfortunately, there's only one rich girl in the neighbourhood. The boys scamper to woo her first, not knowing that their efforts would lead them right into a murder mystery.

programme.desc: The Movie Club

programme.title: Political Khiladi
programme.desc: When Kumaran, an ordinary citizen, abducts the chief minister of the state of Tamil Nadu, the whole nation wonders what could have compelled a seemingly innocent man to adopt such a drastic step.

programme.title: Trust No 1
programme.desc: Officer Bradley (Douglas Rouillard) investigates murders believed to be part of a serial killing and quickly learns it's much bigger. With the body count rising, and nothing adding up, he turns to his last resort for help, his brother.

programme.title: If is a Big Word
programme.desc: It seems to the 35-year-old Yekaterina Kolesnikova that her life got on to the wrong track: instead of being a model on the catwalk in Milan she works in a factory making working clothes. And her husband, a once brilliant and talented musician, has turned out to be a local finance officer. But now Fate suddenly gives Katya a chance to go back seventeen years and try to change her life. Will it make her happy?

programme.title: Life after life
programme.desc: When journalist Masha finally gives up trying to find happiness with Dmitry, an older man who was also her boss, she falls for the much younger Yuri Kozakov - handsome, attentive and seemingly wealthy. But after a hasty marriage, Masha soon begins to notices strange things about Yuri's lifestyle and behaviour. When Yuri leaves for a business trip, Masha hears footsteps in the house and sees a dark shadow in the garden. Soon she will learn Yuri's horrible secret and become threatened by mortal danger, but if she cannot save herself, who will come to her aid in her hour of need?

programme.title: Generation Wolf
programme.desc: Generation Wolf talks about a young entrepreneur who is about to lose his business and choose to grow marijuana as an easy way to save it. But soon enough he realizes that crossing the line could have extreme consequences into his life.

programme.title: A_Shot_in_the_Dark_Portuguese_SD_4000Kbps
programme.desc: A baby is kidnapped in a Brazilian airport. Years later, the mother lives in Lisbon and works in a strip-tease bar so she can survive. When she is fired, she joins a gang of bank robbers...

programme.title: Anonymous_HD_Feature_x264_4mbps
programme.desc: Artemis and Cash set out to take down a child sex trafficking ring and, in doing so discover Artemis' long lost son, only to find there are grave consequences that may cost them their lives and the ones they love. Unbeknownst to Artemis, the hard core enforcer, Olivier (Ernest L. Thomas -What's Happening, Malcolm X, Everybody Hates Chris) is also searching for the boy and willing to do anything to find him.

programme.title: The_Final_Countdown_HD_1980_x264_15mbps
programme.desc: A modern aircraft carrier is thrown back in time to 1941 near Hawaii, just hours before the Japanese attack on Pearl Harbor.

programme.title: Shift_x264_4mbps
programme.desc: After meeting a mysterious stranger, a man must escape a dystopian world to return to his wife.

programme.title: Kisaan
programme.desc: The story of a farmer, Maan Singh, who struggles to save his ancestral land from corrupt officials and greedy businessmen. With the help of his son, he fights against the system and stands up for his rights as a farmer. The movie highlights the challenges faced by farmers in modern India and explores themes of family, tradition, and social justice in a poignant and inspiring plot.

programme.title: Sultaan
programme.desc: Don Kabira helps Ayesha in saving her garage from local goons. However, he hides the fact that he was an honest inspector sometime ago after which Ayesha decides to find out the reason for his transformation.

programme.title: Shootout At Lokhandwala
programme.desc: A film based on a real-life gun battle between the Mumbai police and gangsters in Mumbai Lokhandwala Complex in 1991. The movie follows the story of a notorious gangster, and his team who terrorize the city with their crimes. As the police close in on them, a bloody shootout ensues, leaving many dead on both sides. The film explores the complex dynamics between law enforcement and organized crime in Mumbai's underworld.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time In Mumbai
programme.desc: After Assistant Commissioner Agnel Wilson (Randeep Hooda) unsuccessfully attempts suicide, he recounts his story of the Mumbai, India, underworld, which he'd been investigating for decades. It begins with the tale of Sultan Mirza (Ajay Devgan), a smuggler. Wilson attempts to take Sultan down through the gang leader's relationship with a Bollywood actress, but his attempt fails. Then a rising gangster, Shoaib Khan (Emraan Hashmi), overthrows Sultan -- but the power struggle is far from over.

programme.title: Bruno Brookes UK Top 40 of the 70s Bruno Brookes UK Top 40 of the 70s
programme.desc: Including 10 big million sellers back when it was a rare achievement! These are 40 of the biggest selling songs of the decade with Bay City Rollers, Abba, Queen, Blondie & Wings

programme.title: The 5 O'Clock Groovy Zone! The 5 O'Clock Groovy Zone!
programme.desc: Over-bearded men & leftfield ladies - all with fabulous tunes! These are alternative hits from the west coast, the underground & the counter culture of the 1970s.

programme.title: What Fresh Hell Is This? 1970-1979 What Fresh Hell Is This? 1970-1979
programme.desc: Another batch of silly songs, dodgy videos & novelty hits from the 70s. Yes every one of these was a huge hit!

programme.title: John, Paul, George & Ringo! John, Paul, George & Ringo!
programme.desc: Following their 60s world domination, The Beatles went their separate ways with varying degrees of musical success! Here are some solo videos by the Fab Four from the 1970s & 80s.

programme.title: Elvis in the 70s! Elvis in the 70s!
programme.desc: He had more top 10 hits than anyone else in the 70s (20 of them!) - and here are 8 from the first 4 years of the decade - in order.

programme.title: Far Out, Man! Far Out, Man!
programme.desc: Over-bearded men & leftfield ladies - all with fabulous tunes! These are alternative hits from the west coast, the underground & the counter culture of the 1970s.

programme.title: Tony Blackburn's Swinging 60s! Tony Blackburn's Swinging 60s!
programme.desc: NOW 70s presents 2 hours of classic tunes from the decade before - The Swinging 60s. All brought to you by the man who was there - Sensational Tony Blackburn!

programme.title: 50 Biggest Pop Groups of the 80s!
programme.desc: Pop Groups ruled the 80s & they came in all flavours! From rockers & New Romantics at the start of the decade to high energy & soul at the end. This is our choice of the best 50!

programme.title: Timmy Mallett's Brilliant Bands!
programme.desc: Timmy's back with something a little different - a run through of his favourite 80s bands, many interviewed on his "Timmy On The Tranny" radio show throughout the decade!

programme.title: Best Played at 45 RPM!
programme.desc: Before the CD, the perfect pop songs were spun by singers & bands on 7 inch vinyl. From 1980-1984 these were the classic UK hits that invaded the world!

programme.title: Who Won Wot? 1980-1989
programme.desc: From Smash Hits "Most Unwanted Person of 1980" to the Brits "Best Group" of 1989 - Mark Goodier's 10 hour marathon of 80s award winners lasts nearly as long as the Oscars!

programme.title: The 1975: Fan Favourites
programme.desc: From 2013 to 2022 - 40 minutes of the biggest rock songs from The 1975!

programme.title: Killer Cuts Of The 00s!
programme.desc: A decade of mega hits and the loudest anthems! Expect Biffy Clyro, Linkin Park, Blink 182, Evanescence, Fall Out Boy & loads more!

programme.title: All Killer: Stateside Anthems!
programme.desc: In order, 20 of the biggest american anthems from the 21st Century featuring The Killers, Bon Jovi, Nickleback and One Republic.

programme.title: The Anthems!
programme.desc: Turn it up to 11 for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!

programme.title: Linkin Park: Fan Favourites

programme.title: Alex Baker's Biggest 00s Anthems!

programme.title: I'm LIVE Ep.315
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's episode of I'm LIVE is a band ready to touch our heart - TOUCHED! TOUCHED is back on I'm LIVE 2 years after their first appearance and performs “Hi Bully,” “Alive,” “Shut Down,” “Love is Dangerous,” and more to show off their flawless musicality. TOUCHED is comprised of vocalist and guitarist Yunmin, drummer Kim Seung-bin, bassist John B. Kim, guitarist D.on, and keyboardist Chae Do-hyeon. With their intense sounds and wide spectrum of music, the quintet has been praised for opening a new era in the band music scene. They are also the first band to have won the Grand Prize at the Yoo Jae-ha Music Contest and have taken home top prizes from many other music contests, mesmerizing both critics and general listeners. Tune in to I'm LIVE and meet TOUCHED!

programme.title: Insight With Haslinda Amin
programme.desc: In a volatile and unpredictable world, the show will be the definitive guide for the global news audience to get the complete picture on the biggest story of the day. With news making executives, officials and thought-leaders from the world of business, politics and academia we will explore a story through probing interviews and nuanced conversations. The hour of programming will also highlight the most relevant stories from India which is currently one of the hottest investment destinations, but also has compelling stories that play into the Bloomberg's priority issues such as Climate change, Diversity and Technological innovation.

programme.title: Less than Evel
programme.desc: It is a crime drama about the psychological games between a detective with a strong sense of justice but tormented by the crimes he solves, and a genius woman who is insensitive to her own death. ~~ A remake of the UK series "Luther".

programme.title: Kairos
programme.desc: On the day of Yuil Constuction's charity concert, the daughter of Seo-jin, the company's youngest director, goes missing. Seo-jin tries to find his daughter, but even the police aren't making much progress.

programme.title: W-Two Worlds Apart
programme.desc: A Love Story Between A Couple In Their Early Thirties. They Belong To The Same Era But Alternate Realities. A Surgical Resident Is Pulled Into The Webtoon World Of W, Which Was Created By Her Father, And Becomes Entangled In A Murder Mystery

programme.title: King in the Love
programme.desc: Set in the Goryeo dynasty, it tells the story of a young and ambitious monarch Won (Im Si-wan) with a desire to conquer, and two people who shape his destiny childhood friend Wang Rin (Hong Jong-hyun) and a beautiful young woman named San (Im Yoon-ah).

programme.title: Extra Ordinary
programme.desc: This is a fantasy romance drama about Dan Oh and Ha Ru, who one day find out that they are unimportant characters of a cartoon and change the storyline to make their relationship work out!

programme.title: Medical Top Team
programme.desc: Follows the journey of creating Korea's best multidisciplinary medical team and the stories of doctors inside. Characters who have different hurts and dilemmas struggle as they get to work together and gradually learn that healing a person is healing oneself.

programme.title: My Secret Terrius
programme.desc: Go Ae Rin suddenly loses her husband. A mysterious man, Kim Bon, lives next door. Kim Bon is a legendary NIS agent. He helps Ae Rin uncover a conspiracy, which husband became involved with.

programme.title: Ten Me
programme.desc: While in their early twenties, a medical school student, Oh Chang-min, and a dietitian, Oh Jin-hee, fall in love and marry despite his family's strong opposition. Chang-min comes from a family of wealthy doctors who believe Jin-hee is not good enough for him.

programme.title: Hide & seek
programme.desc: The Tangled Fates Of The Heiress Of A Cosmetics Company And A Woman Who Had To Achieve Everything On Her Own.

programme.title: Mother
programme.desc: A temporary teacher at an elementary school realizes that one of her students is being abused at home by her family.

programme.title: K Chat
programme.desc: K Chat

programme.title: Medical Top Team
programme.desc: Follows the journey of creating Korea's best multidisciplinary medical team and the stories of doctors inside. Characters who have different hurts and dilemmas struggle as they get to work together and gradually learn that healing a person is healing oneself.

programme.title: My Secret Terrius
programme.desc: Go Ae Rin suddenly loses her husband. A mysterious man, Kim Bon, lives next door. Kim Bon is a legendary NIS agent. He helps Ae Rin uncover a conspiracy, which husband became involved with.

programme.title: Maata Ki Mahima
programme.desc: In the divine saga inspired by Bhakt Prahlad, witness the journey of Mahima, a devout disciple of Maata, as she challenges the tyranny of Indrayani, whose sins overflow in a reign of oppression. Sent into the heart of Indrayani's lineage, Mahima embodies the triumph of faith over darkness, destined to end the era of tyranny and usher in an era of righteousness.

programme.title: Paapnaashini Ganga
programme.desc: Paapnaashini Ganga Is A Mythological Show Based On The Life Of Goddess Ganga. The Show Takes The Viewers On The Journey Of Birth And Life Of Ganga. The Reason Behind Ganga'S Birth Was To Destruct Evil Entities. The Powers Of Adishakti Made Mainavati Give Birth To A Female Child Who Became Known As Ganga. Devatas Considered Ganga'S Purity As A Weapon Which Could Destroy Evil Asuras. As A Humble & Virtuous Woman, Ganga'S Entire Life Was Full Of Hardships, Which She Led Washing Away The Sins Of All Of Humanity Without Any Discrimination. Ganga Had Sacrificed All Her Desires On The Altar Of Dharma And Led A Divine Life Full Of Welfare Of Humanity. The Show Is Visually Appealing With Strong Vfx Which Will Enhance The Viewers Experience.

programme.title: Yam Kisi Se Kam Nahin
programme.desc: A misfit, a God, a husband, and a breadwinner, Yamraj is a common man with a fancy job title. He tries his best to give his family what they need and manages to make a mess of everything in the bargain. Lovable and goofy, this God of Death is anything but grim. Join our hardworking but hen-pecked Yamraj, his beloved buffalo and his motely family and friends in a slice-of-life sitcom to find out how the cookie really crumbles!

programme.title: Dharmakshetra
programme.desc: As The Great War Of Mahabharata Is Over, Kurukshetra Lies Barren In Its Great Warriors And King. The Thin Line Between Fair And Unfair, Deceit And Loyalty, Betrayal And Duty, Has Never Been Questioned. Dharmakshetra Resurfaces These Buried Questions And Allows The Legendary Characters Of This Tale An Opportunity To Tell Their Side Of The Story For The Very First Time. In A Post-Apocalyptic Trial, Held In Maharaj Chitragupta'S Court, The Seeming Villains ‘Kauravas' Are Allowed To Accuse The So Called Heroes ‘Pandavas' And Vice Versa, In An Attempt To Justify Their Actions. On A Primary Level, Dharamkshetra Attempts To Ask Some Key Questions About The Nature Of Humanity, While At The Same Time, It Puts Together The Forgotten Pieces Of The Story We Thought We Knew.

programme.title: Laal Banarasi
programme.desc: The story highlights the exploitation happening with the ‘Bunkars' in Banaras, whose craft is appreciated all around the world, but they are paid peanuts by the traders. Amidst this, blooms a love story between the two opposites - Gauri, a bunkar and Garv, a trader. The story is of Gauri who belongs to the bunkar community facing series of incidents which destroys her family and swears to bring about a change in their life and stop the exploitation by directly trading the sarees. This becomes a battle with traders creating hurdles in her life but she is unstoppable.

programme.title: Humkadam
programme.desc: Humkadam is a first of its kind show on Indian television that presents the complicated dynamics of ‘Saas' and ‘Bahu' in a clutter breaking manner. It tells the story of Tara and Shanti who are two diametrically opposite personalities, stuck in unprecedented situations. Just when they thought life had come to a full stop, is where they had to put their differences aside and start a new journey. Will they become each other's Humkadam to face all the adversities together?

programme.title: Dahej Daasi
programme.desc: This story is about a 19yr old girl named Chunari, who dreams of marriage and a happy family. However, she becomes entangled in the chains of deceit, finding herself on the path to becoming a Dahej Dasi, which is a tradition still prevalent in the backward regions of Rajasthan. The show unfolds into a compelling drama of tradition versus rebellion, love versus oppression.

programme.title: Maata Ki Mahima
programme.desc: In the divine saga inspired by Bhakt Prahlad, witness the journey of Mahima, a devout disciple of Maata, as she challenges the tyranny of Indrayani, whose sins overflow in a reign of oppression. Sent into the heart of Indrayani's lineage, Mahima embodies the triumph of faith over darkness, destined to end the era of tyranny and usher in an era of righteousness.

programme.title: Bhabhi Ke Pyare Pritam Hamare
programme.desc: Bhabhi Ke Pyare Pritam Humaare Is A Light-Hearted Celebrity Chat Show Hosted By One Of India'S Most Famous Rj– Pritam Singh. In Each Episode, He Will Welcome Top Female Celebrities From The Entertainment Industry Who Have Played The Roles Of Bhabhi'S & Bahu'S On-Screen, Adding A Pinch Of Glamour To The Show. These Female Celebrities Will Talk About Their Real-World, Tell Their Untold Stories And Reveal How They Live Off-Camera. What'S More? The Episodes Of This Chat Show Will Have An Enthralling Line-Up Of Gag Artists, Activities/Games & Comedy Segments, Along With The Barrel Of Laughs – Pritam.

programme.title: Paapnaashini Ganga
programme.desc: Paapnaashini Ganga Is A Mythological Show Based On The Life Of Goddess Ganga. The Show Takes The Viewers On The Journey Of Birth And Life Of Ganga. The Reason Behind Ganga'S Birth Was To Destruct Evil Entities. The Powers Of Adishakti Made Mainavati Give Birth To A Female Child Who Became Known As Ganga. Devatas Considered Ganga'S Purity As A Weapon Which Could Destroy Evil Asuras. As A Humble & Virtuous Woman, Ganga'S Entire Life Was Full Of Hardships, Which She Led Washing Away The Sins Of All Of Humanity Without Any Discrimination. Ganga Had Sacrificed All Her Desires On The Altar Of Dharma And Led A Divine Life Full Of Welfare Of Humanity. The Show Is Visually Appealing With Strong Vfx Which Will Enhance The Viewers Experience.

programme.title: Yam Kisi Se Kam Nahin
programme.desc: A misfit, a God, a husband, and a breadwinner, Yamraj is a common man with a fancy job title. He tries his best to give his family what they need and manages to make a mess of everything in the bargain. Lovable and goofy, this God of Death is anything but grim. Join our hardworking but hen-pecked Yamraj, his beloved buffalo and his motely family and friends in a slice-of-life sitcom to find out how the cookie really crumbles!

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: I Tried Butler Academy

programme.title: I Trained Like A Ballerina For 6 Weeks
programme.desc: Michelle trains for six weeks with professional ballerinas to take on one of the most demanding and disciplined art forms in the world, culminating in her first-ever live recital featuring pointe shoes, a pas de deux, and the iconic Four Little Swans.

programme.title: I Tried Paramedic Academy
programme.desc: Michelle joins South Metro Fire Rescue to work a real 24-hour paramedic ambulance shift.

programme.title: I Trained Like A Victoria's Secret Model for 5 Weeks
programme.desc: Michelle follows the rigorous diet and workouts of Victoria's Secret models to uncover what it really takes to build and maintain the body of a professional swimsuit model.

programme.title: I Tried The Army
programme.desc: Michelle spends a week training with the U.S. Army at Fort Benning, tackling grueling obstacle courses, airborne training, and marksmanship.

programme.title: I Tried To Become A Runway Model at 5'2”
programme.desc: Michelle challenges industry height norms by training to walk in London Fashion Week show as the shortest runway model in the lineup.

programme.title: I Tried Planning My Wedding In A Week
programme.desc: Michelle and her fiancé Garrett take on the challenge of planning their entire wedding in just one week in hopes of turning months of decisions into one unforgettable, fun-filled seven-day sprint.

programme.title: I Tried CSI Academy
programme.desc: Michelle trains with real homicide detectives, crime scene analysts, and forensic experts to investigate a simulated murder case.

programme.title: I Trained Like A Pop Star For 60 Days
programme.desc: Michelle trains with a top vocal coach to confront her fear of using her singing voice, stepping into the studio to write, record, and release her first original song.

programme.title: I Trained Like Miss USA For 60 Days
programme.desc: After 60 days of training, Michelle competes in her first real beauty pageant, navigating talent performances, Q&A, and evening gown rounds under high pressure.

programme.title: I Learned Hollywood Motion Capture
programme.desc: Michelle trains with the top motion-capture coaches in the industry to see what it's really like to physically perform to successfully embody our favorite CGI characters.

programme.title: I Tried FBI Hostage Negotiation
programme.desc: Michelle trains with the FBI to learn crisis negotiation skills, preparing to de-escalate a high-stakes hostage scenario.

programme.title: I Tried Fire Academy
programme.desc: Michelle joins the South Metro Fire Rescue team, pushing through grueling physical tests and entering a blazing structure fire to experience the intense mental and physical demands firefighters face when saving lives.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.8
programme.desc: Gun shows Mi Young around his office, but Se Ra's unexpected arrival flusters him. He tries to tell Se Ra about his marriage, but Mi Young stops him.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.9
programme.desc: Mi Young develops genuine feelings for Gun, and Gun in turn starts to fall for Mi Young's new side. Se Ra asks Mi Young point-blank if she loves Gun, leaving her rattled, while Daniel feels sorry that Mi Young keeps getting the short end of the stick. Gun revises the divorce agreement he drafted with Mi Young.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.10
programme.desc: News about Gun and Mi Young spreads publicly, and Gun is oddly pleased. While rummaging through the house after his plan goes awry, Yong's mom discovers a suspicious set of divorce papers. Learning the marriage is a contract, Se Ra goes to see Gun again, while Mi Young ends up meeting Daniel when Gun doesn't show up to their appointment.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.11
programme.desc: Waking up in the hospital, Gun shows symptoms suggesting a hereditary illness and doesn't remember Mi Young. Though confused and hurt, she stays by his side. Se Ra seizes the chance to be with Gun as much as possible, but as she realizes how strong Gun and Mi Young's bond still is, she feels threatened.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.12
programme.desc: Mi Young attends the final prenatal class alone—until Gun unexpectedly shows up. Gun breaks up with Se Ra, and Se Ra asks Mi Young to break up with Gun. Overwhelmed, Mi Young tells Daniel, who is leaving for France, that she wants to go with him.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.13
programme.desc: Mi Young makes a successful exhibition debut with Daniel, and when Gun sees them together, jealousy flares. Chairwoman Wang is still pulling every string to get Gun married, but it isn't easy Se Ra is bitter about their lack of progress. Meanwhile, Mi Young runs into Gun outside her hotel room.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Autumn Awosomeness
programme.desc: Set during the harvest, this season finds Briar, Bramble, and their friends spending every day gathering as much food as possible for the upcoming winter. While they look for mushrooms, corn, and of course Bramble's favorite – honey, they have to keep a sharp eye out for the pesky Logger Vick! Fun falls with every leaf this season as the crew finds new adventures with some new friends. Follow the funny and join in on the laughter as it echoes throughout Pine Tree Mountain.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Shrunk
programme.desc: This series follows Lakha, Bablu and Dablu on brand-new wild adventures. Pine Tree Mountain has become a preserve that draws visitors from all around to see its natural beauty and wildlife. This wildlife now includes some new but familiar residents: Hugo and friends from the hit movie, The Big Top Secret!

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Shrunk
programme.desc: This series follows Lakha, Bablu and Dablu on brand-new wild adventures. Pine Tree Mountain has become a preserve that draws visitors from all around to see its natural beauty and wildlife. programme.title: Cindrella
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. But first, Vector needs to collect these skills. He comes up with a power absorbing gadget, which he often disguises, in order to trap and steal abilities from the innocent animals. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu
programme.desc: Carrot Town was once a low-tech community with candles, wind-up clocks, and woodburning stoves. Then a fluke came along – a free-thinking rabbit named SILAS HOPNER who invented a machine that could turn carrots into a fuel called Carrotsene (like kerosene).

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Autumn Awosomeness
programme.desc: Carrot Town was once a low-tech community with candles, wind-up clocks, and woodburning stoves. Then a fluke came along – a free-thinking rabbit named SILAS HOPNER who invented a machine that could turn carrots into a fuel called Carrotsene (like kerosene).

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Autumn Awosomeness
programme.desc: Set during the harvest, this season finds Briar, Bramble, and their friends spending every day gathering as much food as possible for the upcoming winter. While they look for mushrooms, corn, and of course Bramble's favorite – honey, they have to keep a sharp eye out for the pesky Logger Vick! Fun falls with every leaf this season as the crew finds new adventures with some new friends. Follow the funny and join in on the laughter as it echoes throughout Pine Tree Mountain.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Shrunk
programme.desc: This series follows Lakha, Bablu and Dablu on brand-new wild adventures. Pine Tree Mountain has become a preserve that draws visitors from all around to see its natural beauty and wildlife. This wildlife now includes some new but familiar residents: Hugo and friends from the hit movie, The Big Top Secret!

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster Paln
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. But first, Vector needs to collect these skills. He comes up with a power absorbing gadget, which he often disguises, in order to trap and steal abilities from the innocent animals. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

programme.title: Gummy Bear and Friends
programme.desc: Gummy lives in an apartment with his friend Harry the Chameleon, while his other friend Kala the Cat hangs out in a ninja dojo on the roof. Together they go on wild and wacky adventures in their building and hometown. Enjoy the fun and crazy adventures!

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb's eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn't think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn't think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb's world. Ebb and Flo's home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn't Be Better!

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: Zitron joins a friendly snow fight between the cars, but soon uses his Zitronic to trap them in ice cubes!

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: Zitron derails a fun basketball game between the cars. Rodeo and Booster transform into Robo to teach him a lesson.

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: A UFO steals everything on its path in Car City! Robo teams up with Rocky to stop the UFO and Zitron.

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: Zitron challenges the cars to a strength contest, but turns Marley into the Hulk, and he' s completely out of control!

programme.title: VIP Pets
programme.desc: We are the VIP Pets! The coolest pets with a passion for hair! We are best friends and together we will discover lots of beautiful hairstyles and go on exciting adventures!

programme.title: Om Nom Stories
programme.desc: Sweet tooth Om Nom is wandering Around the world, eats a lot of candies and tries to find his Dream job. Watch his adventures and solve different puzzles on the way!

programme.title: Chefclub Kids
programme.desc: With Chefclub Kids, the little ones get their hands dirty all while having fun in the kitchen. Whether they' re learning to prepare dinner, bake goodies, or explore new flavors, Chefclub Kids is a way for children to gain confidence through cooking!

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: The Adventures of Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent is about a young spy with a whole lot to learn, who is paired with a very unlikely partner... his mom!

programme.title: Tom' s Car Wash
programme.desc: Baby Hector' s spent the afternoon jumping in puddles the mud got his blades stuck! Time for a trip to the carwash.

programme.title: Tom' s Car Wash
programme.desc: Chuck's Cherry picker arm is rusty and stiff. He goes to Tom's Car Wash to get cleaned up and oiled up!

programme.title: Tom' s Car Wash
programme.desc: Baby Amber got all dirty while playing with Baby Matt. Tom giver her an emergency carwash and a polish.

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn' t! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can' t help being sucked in by Moose' s relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city's sewers transform into Indiana Jones' white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you've entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Yaaron Ka Yaar
programme.desc: The character of Chota Buddha is inspired from the happiness spread by laughing buddha. Chota Buddha is the fun-spirited lead of this series who loves helping the people of his village, Changjiang.

programme.title: Armor Monster
programme.desc: One day, 12-year-old Zachary once again met the subway "0" which her mother took nine years ago, and the appearance of the subway seems to have some connection with the necklace left by her mother.

programme.title: Mid
programme.desc: Veteran actor, Naseeruddin Shah, explores the many untold stories of Indian cricket. He recalls the history of the game match highlights. Sportsmanship, stadiums, hits and misses, and many more. In his unique narrative style, Naseeruddin Shah brings alive the humorous side of the game, along with undocumented anecdotes and quirky trivia. The show also features many personalities who narrate cricketing experiences and stories including Shashi Tharoor, Narl Contractor, Bishan Singh Bedi and Charu Sharma amongst others

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha
programme.desc: After the resounding success of the first two seasons, EPIC Channel presents a revamped avatar of its Raja Rasoi series. EPIC Channel's Raja Rasoi series - titled Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha - stands true to its name. While the lore and love of Indian food remains just as passionate, the new season presents a discovery oriented show format that transforms table-top cooking into an exciting food lab. Featuring renowned chef Ranveer Brar, the show will take you to his retreat – an old-world bungalow basking in the laidback vibe of Goa and then along on a ride nostalgia and rediscovery both personal and culinary. Ranveer's passion for culinary art makes him a perfect fit as the host for the latest season of the food series. He has dedicated this experimental streak and passion for food to his mentor – Munir Ahmed, a quaint, ordinary yet passionate food enthusiast from the gullies of Lucknow who greatly influenced Brar while growing up in his hometown.

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: Sharanam
programme.desc: Sharanam takes viewers on a poignant journey to some of the most revered pilgrimage sites in India to and highlights the traditions, practices, rituals and ideals that bring people to these holy places in search of something greater than themselves. Narrated by Bollywood actress Juhi Chawla, Sharanam showcases testimonies of personal incidents that are the bedrock of the belief, and follows the strong thread of faith that not only binds the pilgrims to their Gods, but also the nation with itself.

programme.title: The Great Escapes
programme.desc: Dive into a world of action, drama, determination and courage while reliving the greatest escape stories of our time in an all new mini-series ‘The Great Escape'.The show is based on true events and takes you on a thrilling ride of the most daring escapes from Indian history. Some of the stories covered in the series include Sushmita Banerjee's escape from the Taliban in Afghanistan, Dalai Lama's escape from Tibet, the story of a daring jailbreak by the inmates of a jail in Punjab, and Indian prisoner-of-war Nihal Singh and Ram Chander Yadav's escape from the clutches of the Chinese in the Indo-China war. The mini-series even has some comments from the people who made these exhilarating escapes, including the Dalai Lama himself. Each episode takes you to different locations across varied time periods. The stylizations of those eras, mixed with the thrill of escape keeps you hooked till the end.

programme.title: Jugaad Mania
programme.desc: Jugaad Mania is a show that highlights how common people come up with out of the box solutions, to cater to various needs and challenges they face in their life. Innovators will explore the reasons, challenges faced and the circumstances which led them to the specific invention / innovation.

programme.title: Saamagri Sampatti Aur Sauda
programme.desc: Saamagri Aur Sampatti is an animated series detailing the journey of various commodities that shaped India's history through their trade, usage, and spread. The history of a few key commodities for India, such as pepper, silk, coffee, and cotton, are covered in this fascinating 9-episode series.

programme.title: Mid
programme.desc: Veteran actor, Naseeruddin Shah, explores the many untold stories of Indian cricket. He recalls the history of the game match highlights. Sportsmanship, stadiums, hits and misses, and many more. In his unique narrative style, Naseeruddin Shah brings alive the humorous side of the game, along with undocumented anecdotes and quirky trivia. The show also features many personalities who narrate cricketing experiences and stories including Shashi Tharoor, Narl Contractor, Bishan Singh Bedi and Charu Sharma amongst others

programme.title: Lost Recipes
programme.desc: Lost Recipes is all about the food which is diffused into the pages of history and the rediscovery of a tradition that once was. Our host Aditya Bal is on a quest to unearth the once-popular culinary traditions through thirteen regions in India.But these recipes are no longer found in cookbooks, old or new, and seem to have evolved with time. Aditya must turn back the clock and wade through folk and lore to find the original, Lost Recipes.

programme.title: Sinister Storms

programme.title: WS Viral Wild
programme.desc: Fly high and get a bird's eye view with some of our favorite feathered friends.

programme.title: WS Viral Wild

programme.title: Storm Hunters

programme.title: Storm Hunters

programme.title: Storm Hunters

programme.title: Battle Factory
programme.sub-title: An Amphibious Armoured Vehicle, a Bomb Robot, and a Life Raft
programme.desc: When a steel plated hull is fitted with controls on the inside and tracks on the outside, it'll become the Viking BVS10 –an armoured amphibious personnel carrier that can get troops in and out of any combat zone, even if it has to go through snow, sand, or water to get there.

programme.title: Battle Factory
programme.sub-title: A Helmet, a Zippo, a Fuel Bladder, and a Simulated IED
programme.desc: When a series of delicate snowflake shaped sheets of Aramid are pressed together, they'll form a piece of headgear that's comfortable enough to wear to war, and tough enough to take a bullet.

programme.title: The Ultimates
programme.desc: A fascinating look at the radical concepts and innovative ideas that are making trains faster, safer and ever more futuristic.

programme.title: The Ultimates

programme.title: The Demolition Man

programme.title: The Demolition Man
programme.desc: Explosive demolition of the O. K. Allen Bridge.

programme.title: Power &

programme.title: Health Explored

programme.title: Health Explored
programme.desc: Why are we drawn to water? Is it just a nice view or is there more under the surface. We ask the question – does being close to or in water actually improve our health?

programme.title: Health Explored
programme.desc: Travel to Taranaki to learn about the innovative surf therapy program, Taupo to learn about the Maori connection with water and other fascinating take homes about our mental health.

programme.title: Secrets of the Brain
programme.desc: In this episode, Dr Jack Lewis investigates the neuroscience behind genius. He meets a genuine genius, Sabrina Chevannes, a woman with an IQ of 178 at just 4.

programme.title: Blue Realm
programme.desc: Sharks are BIG business in adrenaline eco-tourism. And some thrill seekers deliberately pursue close encounters with deadly sharks without the protection of a cage. The bigger and more dangerous the shark, the better.

programme.title: Blue Realm
programme.desc: Singing louder than any animal on earth, humpback whales are famous for their haunting songs and jaw-dropping acrobatics. They were hunted to the brink of extinction until a moratorium on killing them was implemented in the 1960s.

programme.title: Blue Realm
programme.desc: Each year, hundreds of critically endangered manatees are killed in U.S. waters by boats, disease and cold weather. 2006 was the worst year on record for manatee deaths 416 animals perished.

programme.title: Killer Instincts
programme.desc: From crocodiles to vipers to great white sharks, explore the deadly power of nature's sharpest jaws and the killer teeth that rule the wild.

programme.title: Killer Instincts
programme.desc: From goliath groupers to polar bears and mighty anacondas, witness how nature's heavyweights use killer instincts to rule their realms.

programme.title: Killer Instincts
programme.desc: From dolphins to hyenas to killer whales, discover how intelligence and killer instincts combine to create nature's most cunning predators.

programme.title: Modern Migrations
programme.desc: In this episode of Modern Migrations we've reached the end of the capture season. However, before we reflect on the seasons' high's and low's it is history in the making when we will attempt to relocate a black rhino cow AND her calf simultaneously!

programme.title: Wild Walk
programme.desc: Walk with leopards as Swati travels to the Cederburg mountains to learn about the cape leopard, to question what puts leopards in conflict with people and what the solutions to this conflict might be?

programme.title: Wild Walk
programme.desc: Come walk with Africa's lions. Swati learns about the cruel practice of canned lion hunts and the people who are fighting to have it banned entirely.

programme.title: Wild Walk
programme.desc: Swati walks with more of Africa's lions and learns about more conservation issues that surround them. Are Africa's lions endangered? Can their population decline be halted? Does Africa have space for its greatest land predator? All this and more.

programme.title: Wild Walk
programme.desc: Endemic only to South Africa, the African penguins are a national treasure and yet they face a sixteen year countdown to extinction. Can this be reversed? Swati walks with the penguins to answer these questions.

programme.title: All Girls Garage

programme.desc: The women take on a 1953 F100 that has a 1999 Ford Lightning chassis, and they do some build work to the interior, and then they get under the hood to get the truck running.

programme.title: Snake Master

programme.title: The Blue Realm
programme.desc: Around the globe, thousands of decommissioned naval vessels rot in dockyards. What can you do with these toxic time bombs? One solution is to clean them well, blow them up and sink them! Providing shelter and breeding grounds, countless fish and invertebrates colonize steel hulls.

programme.title: Shark Gordon
programme.desc: Ian Gordon is embarking on a mission to observe the Port Jackson Shark during breeding season and explore the myth of their famous parenting methods.

programme.title: Animal Society
programme.desc: Our closest relatives, primates are a diverse group of highly intelligent mammals. Over 440 species, with varied social structures and behaviours, explore chimpanzee's, gorillas, orangutan and more.

programme.title: Safari Flix
programme.desc: Safari Flix is hosted by an experienced ranger/guide who provides compelling in-the-moment narration on the action as it happens. Not only will viewers marvel at the incredible wildlife sightings featured in the show, but so too will they be exposed to a wealth of information on the animals in particular and the African bush and pressing environmental matters in general.

programme.title: Snake Master
programme.desc: Renowned herpetologist Nirut Chomngam takes viewers on a wild journey across the country in an unforgettable adventure filled with deadly encounters, as he joins conservation teams tasked with protecting these astonishing creatures and their jungle home.

programme.title: The Blue Realm

programme.title: Shark Gordon

programme.title: Camera Trap Catches Rare Animal!
programme.desc: Coyote sets up a hidden camera trap and captures never-before-seen animal behavior in the wild. The footage is stunning and unexpected.One of Mark's most anticipated stings—the warrior wasp! With a pain rating system in place, he breaks down exactly how intense it is.

programme.title: Bullet Ant Box – Will I Get Stung?!
programme.desc: Back in the bullet ant box! Coyote endures more stings to test endurance, pain, and his own mental limits in this returning challenge.Being a snake milker is one of the world's most dangerous jobs. Coyote counts down the top 10 most intense moments in venom extraction.

programme.title: Bitten by Giant Soldier Ants!
programme.desc: Ants that don't just bite—they coordinate! Coyote is bitten by giant soldier ants to demonstrate their incredible defense strategy.

programme.title: New Species! World's Rarest Toad Found?
programme.desc: A rare toad species makes a surprise appearance. Mark reveals what makes it the world's rarest and where it was finally found.Deep in Ecuador, Mark finds a strange, oversized leaf insect. Its camouflage is astonishing, making it one of the best hidden creatures alive.

programme.title: Abandoned Island! – Can We Survive 24 Hours?
programme.desc: Can Coyote and his team survive 24 hours on an abandoned island? With no supplies, the wilderness becomes both home and threat.

programme.title: Black vs. Green: Milking Deadly Mambas! (Final Snake Milking)
programme.desc: It's a venom showdown—black mamba vs green mamba. Coyote helps milk these snakes and explores which is more dangerous and why.

programme.title: Burned by a Giant Fireworm!
programme.desc: The giant fireworm brings the burn—literally. Mark handles this bizarre sea creature and ends up with chemical irritation on his skin.Coyote explores a lost island, teeming with mystery. From rare creatures to haunting terrain, this wild place holds unexpected surprises.

programme.title: Jellyfish Jolt! Coyote's Shocking Experiment!
programme.desc: A shocking episode—literally. Coyote tests the sting of a jellyfish and demonstrates just how much electricity nature can pack.In this serene underwater adventure, Mark swims with over 100 gentle manatees and shares why they're so crucial to marine ecosystems.

programme.title: Would You Enter the Dragon Infested Island?!
programme.desc: Would you explore an island crawling with giant reptiles? Coyote does, facing huge dragons, rough terrain, and epic surprises.Something from the deep clamps onto Mark. In this spine-tingling episode, he's bitten by a mysterious deep-sea creature.

programme.title: I Turned Myself into the Little Mermaid!
programme.desc: Guest host Christina Wilson takes a whimsical dive into mermaid life, transforming underwater for a hilarious and oddly educational aquatic adventure.The batfish looks like something from another planet. Mark dives to find this awkward but fascinating creature of the ocean floor.

programme.title: Sliced by a Spiny Lobster!
programme.desc: The spiny lobster's claws may look small, but one swipe slices skin. Coyote takes a cut and explains this crustacean's anatomy.Tarpon are giant, fast, and aggressive. Coyote gets up close—and briefly inside—during this wild feeding encounter in the water.

programme.title: Stung by a Fireworm!
programme.desc: The fireworm burns without flame. Mark handles this stinging marine creature and ends up with a fiery rash to prove it.Ever wondered what a thousand mosquito bites look like? Coyote offers his arms as bait and explores how mosquitoes affect humans and ecosystems.

programme.title: Diving with a Jetpack!
programme.desc: This emotional episode follows chimpanzees rescued from testing labs as they adapt to new lives of freedom and care.Coyote tests an underwater jetpack, soaring through the ocean and meeting sea life in this high-speed dive adventure you have to see to believe!

programme.title: I Found the World's Smartest Octopus! (Wonderpus)
programme.desc: Mark meets the Wonderpus octopus, a master of camouflage and cognition. This episode is part science lesson, part magical underwater journey.Buried in the sand lies a nightmare: the bobbit worm. Mark reveals this hidden predator's lightning-fast strike and bizarre anatomy.

programme.title: The Wizard Of Whatever
programme.desc: Chef Kyle Crawford unveils four spellbinding dishes! First up, sun-dried tomato bucatini! Next, Cornish hen, foie gras with waffles! Followed by a crab-shrimp souffle, and braised veal shoulder!

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.desc: First up, Belgium is famous for its mussels and fries, aka 'Moule Frite'. Chef Wong has a unique take featuring Belgian beer steamed mussels salad, waffle cut fries, and potato-leek mousse. Next, Steak Madagascar is an old school fine-dining fave, this take, uses modernist 'spherification' for the sauce, and a vanilla bean rub for a steak that is decidedly not 'old school', wow! For a common ingredient, how about sweet breakfast? Belgians are famous for Liege Waffles, and Madagascar loves Mofogasy, a pancake made with rice flour and coconut. The final dish is inspired by Belgian Waterzooi, a root veggie stew, mixed with a popular Malagesy stir-fry with shellfish and pork... Chef carefully and skillfully balances all the elements, using lobster, bacon breadcrumbs, and adding a modern touch with mango pickle 'pearls'!

programme.title: Let's Brunch

programme.title: Word Travels
programme.sub-title: the Truth Behind the Byline - Lithuania

Julia looks into a quirky Soviet theme park, where the harsh history meets communist kitsch.

programme.title: Kia Sportage Exterior Design in Lunar Silver
programme.desc: A number of new technologies optimize the precision and control of the chassis in a wide variety of weather and road conditions. The standard electronic damper control (Electronic Control Suspension, ECS) in the GT-line version increases comfort and safety thanks to the continuous damping control. The system reacts to body movements and steering inputs and changes the damping behavior at lightning speed in order to counteract the vehicle's diving, pitching and rolling movements when cornering. It also adjusts the damping force in the case of obstacles in order to cope with them as comfortably as possible and to reduce the influence of post-vibrations on the wheels. A premiere for the Sportage is the “All-Terrain-Mode”, which will be available for the plug-in hybrid version with all-wheel drive. The system offers intelligent support when driving off-road or on snow by automatically optimizing the vehicle settings depending on the selected mode and thus helping the SUV to achieve maximum traction on muddy, sandy or snowy surfaces.

programme.title: The new Mercedes-Benz GLC AMG Line World Premiere Teaser
programme.desc: The new GLC is immediately recognisable as a member of the Mercedes-Benz SUV family. Standard equipment includes the AVANTGARDE exterior with Chrome package including chrome window surrounds and a new, chrome-look simulated underguard. This adds striking design features and enhances the unique proportions of the vehicle. One of the defining design highlights of the GLC is the redesigned front end, with headlamps that connect directly to the radiator grille to emphasise the vehicle's width, and the new radiator grille as part of the standard AVANTGARDE exterior, which now has a chrome surround and a sporty louvre in matt grey with chrome trim. The AMG Line has a radiator grille with Mercedes-Benz pattern. The body design is characterised by a full, spanned surface design enriched with precisely shaped edges in the sides. These emphasise the proportions, accentuate the muscular wheel arches and create a balance between elegance and off-road performance. Wheel arch liners in the vehicle colour are available from the AMG Line upwards for the first time. These accentuate the sportiness of the AMG Line, as optional equipment in conjunction with mixed tyres. Also available as an optional extra are easy-entry running boards and, from the AMG Line upwards, a Night package.

programme.title: MINI TAKES THE STATES 2022 hits the road for another epic adventure
programme.desc: The one-make championship, organized by MINI Italia with the support of ACI Sport, is ready to kick off the eleventh season. This year there are three categories that compete on the tracks of the main Italian circuits, in six exciting events from 2 July to 23 October 2022. San Donato Milanese. Now in its eleventh consecutive edition, the MINI Challenge 2022 single-make championship warms up its engines to start a season full of challenges. Also this year, MINI Italia renews its commitment to organizing one of the most exciting competitions on the Italian scene. Passion, challenge, community and the art of performance are among the values of the famous championship signed by the iconic premium brand with a sporting DNA. The six events of 2022 will see the drivers compete on the tracks of the most famous national circuits. The MINI John Cooper Works Challenge Lite, the MINI John Cooper Works Challenge Pro and the MINI John Cooper Works Challenge Evo are ready to challenge each other in a new season full of emotions. The Academy race category continues in 2022, which also sees the under 25s on the track, as part of the MINI program dedicated to young people.

programme.title: The Mercedes EQS SUV Electric Art Line Driving Video
programme.desc: With the luxury saloon EQS and the sporty executive saloon EQE, Mercedes-Benz has entered a new, all-electric era in the upper market segments as well. The EQS SUV, the third model series with this architecture developed for electric vehicles, will soon follow. The SUV offers plenty of space, comfort and connectivity for up to seven passengers in its avant-garde, luxurious interior. Thanks to powerful electric motors, responsive 4MATIC all-wheel drive and an intelligent OFFROAD driving mode, the EQS SUV is also capable of tackling light terrain with ease. The new EQS SUV shares the long wheelbase (3210 millimetres) with the EQS Saloon, but is over 20 centimetres higher. The dimensions in detail: 5125/1959/1718 millimetres (length/width/height). The interior dimensions benefit from these generous SUV dimensions and from the advantages of the purpose design tailored to the electric platform. The second row of seats can be electrically adjusted as standard. Up to four golf bags fit in the boot. A third row of seats with two additional individual seats and extensive comfort features for all passengers is available as an option.

programme.title: Colour change with the power of thought
programme.sub-title: The BMW iX Flow meets neuro-technology - Colour change with the power of thought - The BMW iX Flow meets neuro-technology
programme.desc: The Munich-based startup brainboost used the new and improved colour-changing effect in a one-off collaboration with the BMW Group at rad°hub aimed at raising awareness of mental health. With the help of brainboost, the BMW iX Flow was connected directly to the brain of the rad°hub delegates using an electroencephalograph (EEG), which records the brain's electrical activity. “The colour patterns of the BMW iX Flow react to brain activity and reflect the level of activity,” explains brainboost CEO Philipp Heiler. “Once the brain is at rest, the changes of patterns on the iX Flow also become calmer and more rhythmical.” A special animation was activated if delegates managed to maintain this state for several seconds. Thus, the participants were able to gradually calm and relax their brains under the guidance of the brainboost experts and with the help of neurofeedback via the iX Flow. This matures the knowledge of which strategies work best to specifically shut down one's own brain activity for relaxation, e.g. in everyday working life.

programme.title: Wellbeing behind the wheel – The new Bentley Azure Range_en
programme.sub-title: Wellbeing behind the wheel – The new Bentley Azure Range
programme.desc: To celebrate the arrival of the new Bentayga EWB, an exclusive First Edition is now available. Subject to a limited production run for the first twelve months of orders, it combines many of the most desirable options available for the car with a package of eye-catching details found only on Bentley First Editions. First Edition badging can be seen to the exterior of the car – a theme that extends inside, with badging on the veneered fascia, as well as embroidery on the seats. Unique First Edition contrast stitching and embroidery adorns the seats and, depending on the choice of veneers, handcrafted metal overlays just 0.075 mm thick can be applied to the fascia and waistrails in the front and the rear door veneer. The First Edition offers elegant and timeless design, focusing on maximum comfort and well-being. This specifically tailored specification includes a unique 22” ten-spoke directional wheel and bright lower bumper grilles. Other additional features as standard include unique quilted seats, mood lighting, a heated steering wheel, and increased driver's assistance aids. Attention to detail is clear, from the badging that identifies the car to the jewelled caps on the fuel and oil fillers.

programme.title: The new Porsche 911 GT3 R
programme.sub-title: Design_en - The new Porsche 911 GT3 R - Design
programme.desc: The turbocharged three-litre flat-six in the new 911 GTS delivers 353 kW (480 PS). Maximum torque is 570 Nm, an increase of 20 Nm over its predecessor. Zero to 100 km/h takes just 3.3 seconds (911 Carrera 4 GTS: Fuel consumption combined (NEDC) 10.5 – 9.7 l/100 km, Fuel consumption combined (WLTP) 11.4 – 10.6 l/100 km, CO₂ emissions combined (NEDC) 240 – 222 g/km, CO₂ emissions combined (WLTP) 259 – 240 g/km) in the 911 Carrera 4 GTS Coupé with the eight-speed Porsche dual-clutch transmission (PDK): three tenths faster than its predecessor. A seven-speed manual transmission with a particularly short throw is available for all 911 GTS models as an alternative to the PDK.

programme.title: From concept vehicle to full-production ID
programme.sub-title: From concept vehicle to full-production ID. Buzz - How was the electric Microbus created
programme.desc: The new model line's assistance systems perfect ease of driving and safety. Included as standard in the ID. Buzz and ID. Buzz Cargo is the ‘Car2X' local warning system, which utilises signals from other vehicles and the transport infrastructure to spot hazards in real time. Also included as standard: the ‘Front Assist' emergency braking function and, in the MPV, the ‘Lane Assist' lane-keeping assistant. With new software, new assistance functions are also making their way into the ID. family. Available as an option is ‘Travel Assist with swarm data', which facilitates partially automated driving across the entire speed range and, for the first time, assisted lane-changing on the motorway. Also new: the ‘Memory Function' for automated parking on a previously saved route.

programme.title: New 2023 Range Rover Sport Product Highlights_en
programme.sub-title: New 2023 Range Rover Sport Design Reveal Film
programme.desc: The New Range Rover Sport has made its global premiere with a dramatic world-first climb up a flooded dam spillway in Iceland. The epic ascent saw New Range Rover Sport resist the surging torrent of water flowing down the ramp of the Karahnjukar Dam – the biggest of its kind in the world – at a rate of 750 tonnes per minute. A loss of traction risked plunging down the perilous 90m drop at the base of the spillway to the valley floor below. The successful spillway ascent was screened for the first time at an exclusive launch event at Jaguar Land Rover's Advanced Product Creation Centre at Gaydon, UK. Official James Bond stunt driver Jessica Hawkins was behind the wheel as the New Range Rover Sport demonstrated its grip, traction, performance and composure, completing the latest in a series of challenges for Land Rover's luxury performance SUV. Previous feats include a record-setting hill-climb at Pikes Peak, a first recorded crossing of the ‘Empty Quarter' desert in the Arabian Peninsula and a first ascent of the 999 steps to Heaven's Gate in China, in 2018.

programme.title: Hispano Suiza showcases its history in the Peralada Castle Museum
programme.desc: The history of Hispano Suiza is showcased, for the very first time, in the Peralada Castle Museum (Girona, Spain) where visitors will be able to contemplate the past and present of the legendary car brand founded in 1904 by Damián Mateu and Mark Birkigt. The Hispano Suiza Room will close the usual tour of the Peralada Castle Museum. After years of researching to gather the largest number of pieces and objects related to its history, Hispano Suiza becomes part of this important collection. The Hispano Suiza exhibition encompasses a journey through various decades: from the beginning of the 20th century, when Hispano Suiza was founded, to the present day. After passing through a luxurious hall, the public will be able to visit a recreation of the offices of Damián Mateu and Mark Birkigt, where countless business and technical ideas, emerged and took shape, turning Hispano Suiza into a point of reference, for luxury, comfort and technical solutions. In this area, the original painting 'Dame with a mink' by Ramon Casas takes pride of place: it was used as an illustration on the company's original shares.

programme.title: TechDay Digital Light
programme.sub-title: Digital Future Lighting - TechDay Digital Light - Digital Future Lighting
programme.desc: Safety and customer satisfaction come first at Audi. They are part and parcel of the success of the company with the four rings. In that context, light technology is steadily growing more important and creating a wider range of possibilities and perspectives, from added safety for the driver, to external communication and individualization. Systematic light digitization is making all of this possible. It is particularly visible in the new Audi A8: the forward-looking Digital Matrix LED headlights and digital OLED rear lights raise the customer experience to a whole new level: for the first time in any Audi model, light is completely digitized. The car can be individualized even further through its digital OLED rear lights. The Digital Matrix LED headlights also include three new functions: advanced traffic information, a lane light with direction indicator lights on highways, and an orientation light on country roads. These features not only demonstrate Audi's “Vorsprung durch Technik,” they also add value.

programme.title: 2022 Peugeot 308
programme.sub-title: Crash & Safety Tests - 2022 Peugeot 308 - Crash & Safety Tests
programme.desc: The sixth generation Opel/Vauxhall Astra and third generation Peugeot 308 are both based on the Stellantis EMP2 platform and, unsurprisingly, score very similarly across all four areas of assessment. Both the offset test and the full-width crash test highlighted marginal chest injury protection for average male and small female drivers, and neither car was equipped with a centre airbag for far-side crash protection, a countermeasure which is increasingly common on modern cars. Both cars offer plenty of crash avoidance technology but do not include some of the latest advancements introduced in the market. The cars' four-star ratings apply also to their PHEV variants.

programme.title: Maximum Foodie
programme.desc: It's an incalculable undertaking to understand the cuisine of India the depth of it is simply massive. Over the next 2 episodes, Sashi will explore the country from coast to coast, to understand how the cuisine changes as the kilometers rack up This episode starts off with a rendezvous with Mumbai's hottest chef, Prateek Sadhu. Sashi takes an inside look into how the city's most popular restaurant, Masque does their signature 8 hands collaborative event. With Prateek and his star studded guest chefs, Matt Orlando from Copenhagen and Ivan Brehm from Nouri in Singapore the trio head to Delhi for an ingredients scoring mission. From biodynamic farms in the outskirts to the old Delhi markets hunting down spices - Sashi takes a detailed look at how these high end collaborations come together, from start to finish.

programme.title: Maximum Foodie
programme.desc: The India foodie excursion continues. This time, Sashi is in the eastern fringe of India. Revelling in the colonial splendor of Kolkata, exploring bustling fish markets and a unique story of India's only Chinatown. Sashi then tracks down south to Orissa where he comes across a once in a lifetime opportunity and access to Puri's Jagannath temple's maha bhog the massive effort of religious food offerings made daily to Lord Jagannath, one of the world's largest kitchen operations that feed over 100,000 people every single day! Following recipes and ingredients that have been unchanged for millenia - a stark contrast to the previous episode showcasing Masque and their cutting edge techniques. It just goes to show how diverse India's culinary spectrum really is!

programme.title: Travel Quest
programme.desc: Most of safari Africa is populated with the megafauna we see regularly on TV—lions, savannah elephants, Nile Crocodiles, Cape Buffalo to name a few. There is one area of the African rainforest where that isn't the case.

programme.title: Epic Trails
programme.desc: Eric Hanson explores the incredible backpacking trails that surround one of the most adventurous mountain towns in North America - Revelstoke, British Columbia.

programme.title: Epic Trails
programme.desc: Eric Hanson travels to the tropical paradise known as Dominica to hike the longest trail in the Caribbean and experience the thrill of freediving and canyoning.

programme.title: Epic Trails
programme.desc: Eric Hanson discovers the amazing hiking and climbing adventures to be had in the cool, mountain-town known as Estes Park, Colorado.

programme.desc: Madeleine is 10. She is a smart, active girl who enjoys playing soccer, beading, reading and playing with her friends. She rejects girly norms, the colour pink and all things frilly. She is an active member of her school's eco club. Her bedroom is the old master bedroom of the house and it needs updating. They haven't touched it since she was 2 years old when her Mom painted some murals on the walls.

programme.title: Accidental Chef
programme.desc: Melvyn's culinary journey culminates to a homecoming this week- Singapore. In this city where he grew up, Melvyn hopes to rediscover the history and culture through two very important groups of Singaporeans- the Peranakans and the Eurasians. They represent the multi-ethnic past and present of the nation.

programme.desc: Paul and Nick meet with Colin Brooks of the 1718 project, founded to investigate the historical links between Ulster, Scotland and Philadelphia. They also cook for Randall Redman, who claims to be able to trace his ancestry to Robert The Bruce.

programme.title: Paul & Nicks Big American Food Trip
